ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividend amount distributed */,
  "stock_splits" INTEGER /* Number of stock splits */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted highest price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt value for password hashing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analytics) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the modification occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the modification */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the modification */,
  "changed_columns" TEXT /* Columns that were changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data provider's API */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for accessing the data provider's API */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data provider was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data provider information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data feed was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data feed information */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of market data (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the market data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
